Renowned for her expertise in operations research, Janelle Hewstone authored the influential work, Glasswing Frequency Node, which has elevated her profile in the professional community. Apart from her research achievements, she became the proud recipient of the Sunspire Mosaic Shield for her exceptional contributions. Her interests also extend to horology, as she is an active member of the Quickstep Clockmakers. Through her work and affiliations, Janelle leaves a lasting mark on both research and craft.
